Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptionally strong long-term momentum performers at the top of the ranker. CLMT ranks #1 with a score of 94.6, posting a 548.77% five-year return and 157.55% one-year return while trading above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200). FUWAY displays even more extreme long-term performance with a 1075.28% ten-year return and 688.99% five-year return, crushing SPY by 841.23% over the past decade. However, CLMT shows a significant momentum deterioration in the ten-year timeframe (ratio_10y_5y of only 0.23) and underperforms SPY by 109.94% over that period, suggesting recent outperformance masks longer-term weakness. Both stocks pass 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds and maintain clean technical setups, but FUWAY's consistent outperformance across all time horizons and benchmarks (SPY, QQQ, IAU) contrasts sharply with CLMT's recent relative strength masking decade-long underperformance.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
